---
title: "AI in Research & Social Care"
description: "Care PhD Forum"
author: "Mustafa Aslan"
date: "2026-04-23"
image: "../images/ai.jpeg"
categories:
  - AI
  - Research
  - Social Care
  - PhD
link-external-newwindow: true
---


![](../images/ai.jpeg){fig-align="center"}

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">

[<i class="fas fa-bookmark"></i> Slides](../care_phd/slides.qmd){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}

**Date:** Apr 23 2026 12:00-17:00 \
**Event:** Care PhD Forum\
**Location:** Spark, Cardiff University, UK

## Context

In this talk, I will discuss the transformative potential of AI in research and social care. I will cover the basics of AI, its applications in research, key tools for researchers, and specific use cases in social care.
